parts.text: Can you tell me about my plan’s international calling and roaming options?
I want to discuss my current plan with a representative to clarify the features.
Please provide information about my plan coverage, cost, and any included extras.
I need help understanding my plan details because I’m unclear on what’s included.
I want to check what options I have in my current plan and if I can upgrade.
Can you provide a breakdown of my plan’s data, voice, and messaging limits?
I’m looking to understand all the charges and features associated with my mobile plan.
I want to compare my current plan with other available plans to see if there’s a better fit.
I need to inquire about my plan, including any changes made by customer service recently.
I received a notification about my plan and want to verify the features and costs.
Can someone explain all the details of my mobile plan and the monthly charges?
I would like to know how much data and talk time I have remaining on my plan.
I just switched plans and I want to confirm what’s included in my new plan.
Please help me understand my plan and whether there are better options available.
I need information about my phone plan, including pricing, data, and any add-ons.
I want to review what features are included in my plan and if I’m getting all the benefits.
Can you tell me the details of my current mobile plan, including data and minutes?
